title: Cops Save Hostages From Killer's House Of Horrors
description:
Going to therapy is a sign of strength, not weakness. My sponsor BetterHelp
makes therapy simple, with 10% off your first month to help you get started: https://betterhelp.com/DrInsanity

Police are surrounding a house in the middle of Kenosha city. Inside, an unknown suspect is holding wounded hostages, and exchanging heavy gunfire with officers…

In the middle of this chaos, officers have no idea who they’re dealing with or why he’s even firing at them. And with every passing minute, the situation spirals further out of control.

But by the time police finally confront the gunman… it will already be too late.
